references.text: Njuguna AW, ZZ Li, JK Saina, JM Munywoki, ZW Gichira, RW Gituru, QF Wang & JM Chen. 2019. Comparative analyses of the complete chloroplast genomes of Nymphoides and Menyanthes species (Menyanthaceae). Aquatic Botany 156: 73-81
Tippery NP & DH Les. 2011. Phylogenetic relationships and morphological evolution in Nymphoides (Menyanthaceae). Systematic Botany 36: 1101-1113

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 27 June 2021

species.citation: (Roxb.) Kuntze , Revis. Gen. Pl. 2 (1891) 429; ≡ Limnanthemum cristatum (Roxb.) Griseb. , Gen. Sp. Gent. (1839) 342 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 319; ≡ Menyanthes cristata Roxb. , Pl. Coromandel 2 (1799) 3.
species.distribution: China, India, Pakistan, Philippines, Taiwan. LUZON: Benguet, Ilocos Norte, Laguna, Mountain Province, Rizal, Zambales.
species.notes: Note by P.B. Pelser (3-Jan-20): Also considered a synonym of Nymphoides hydrophylla (Lour.) Kuntze, but kept separate here awaiting further study. Low and medium elevation shallow lakes, quiet streams, and sometimes in rice paddies. (?-)2100m.

species.citation: (L.) Kuntze , Revis. Gen. Pl. 2 (1891) 429; ≡ Limnanthemum indicum (L.) Griseb. , Gen. Sp. Gent. (1839) 343 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 319; ≡ Menyanthes indica L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 145 ; Blanco, Fl. Filip. (1837) 87; Fl. Filip. ed. 2 (1845) 63; Fl. Filip. ed. 3, 1 (1877) 118.
species.distribution: Bangladesh, Cambodia, China, India, Korea, Laos, Lesser Sunda Isls, Malay Peninsula, Middle East, Myanmar, Nepal, New Caledonia, Pacific Ocean, Philippines, Sri Lanka, Taiwan, Thailand, Vietnam. BOHOL, LUZON: Benguet, Cagayan, Laguna, Rizal, MINDANAO, MINDORO.
species.notes: Low and medium elevation shallow lakes and quiet streams. (?-)1500m.
